intent.natural_language_goal: design computational protein binder candidates against public human PD-L1 surfaces for benchmark validation

public_accession_candidates.label: PD-L1 / PD-1 complex
public_accession_candidates.role: primary PD-L1 / PD-1 reference and chain A target source

public_accession_candidates.label: PD-L1 with deposited de novo binder
public_accession_candidates.role: positive control reference: deposited 58-aa de novo binder with picomolar KD; used to validate Boltz cofold plumbing

target_window_hypotheses.design_goal: protein binder candidates against the PD-L1 IgV-domain face that engages PD-1 (chain A residues 19-127)
risk_notes: claim ceiling is candidate; no binding/inhibition claims without experimental validation
PD-L1 is widely targeted; novel binders must be checked against deposited structures for inadvertent recapitulation

workflow.method: RCSB metadata resolver for PD-L1 / PD-1 references (4ZQK, 8ZNL, 5C3T)
load committed pd-l1-binder-window dossier and verify chain A residues 19-127 + 10 hotspot residues
fetch 4ZQK from RCSB, audit chain A coordinates and hotspot solvent exposure
clone Genie 3 at pinned SHA, install dependencies, fetch operator-gated weights
Genie 3 canary generation: 1 problem x small n_sample for plumbing verification before extended wave
Boltz cofold cross-check on canary candidates plus PD-L1 receptor to validate scoring pipeline
Genie 3 extended generation: 8 problems x n_sample=32 with direction_scale=2.0 hotspot steering on 5 PD-L1 interface residues; binder length window 60-90 aa
sequence-level pre-filter (length/charge/GRAVY/novelty vs 8ZNL) trims 256 -> top 32 forward to Boltz cofold cross-check and interface scoring
rank top 32 candidates by Genie 3 / Boltz agreement, hotspot recapitulation, and disagreement signals
compose HTML report with candidate jury, validation artifacts, and operator dossier
claim ledger emission and forbidden-claim scan across all candidate text
stage-contract self-check verifying all required outputs and done markers

negative_controls: Boltz fold-confidence and interface-confidence disagreement cases
novelty check against deposited 8ZNL binder to flag inadvertent recapitulation
